UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the application, managing personal details and global notification preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image.

notificationsEnabled.description: Indicates whether the user has globally enabled push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user's profile was created.

Household.title: Household
Household.description: Represents a family unit, linking parents/guardians to multiple minor players for unified management.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a sports team that users can create, join, and manage within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

sport.description: The sport associated with the team (e.g., 'Basketball', 'Soccer').

teamLogoUrl.description: URL to the team's logo image.

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code for joining the team.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created.

TeamMembership.title: TeamMembership
TeamMembership.description: Links a user to a specific team, defining their role and team-specific details like position and jersey number. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TeamMembership, Team 1:N TeamMembership)

id.description: Unique identifier for the TeamMembership entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TeamMembership)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team. (Relationship: Team 1:N TeamMembership)

role.description: The user's role within the team, either 'Admin' or 'Member'.

position.description: The user's position within the team (e.g., 'Forward', 'Guard').

jerseyNumber.description: The user's jersey number for the team.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user joined the team.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents an activity feed post within a team, which can include text, an image, or a link to an event. (Relationship: Team 1:N Post, UserProfile 1:N Post, Event 0:1 Post)

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this post belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Post)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who authored the post. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Post)

content.description: The textual content of the post.

imageUrl.description: URL of an optional single image attached to the post.

linkedEventId.description: Optional reference to an Event associated with the post. (Relationship: Event 0:1 Post)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

isSystemPost.description: Indicates if the post was automatically generated by the system (e.g., event created, member joined).

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made on a team feed post. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment, UserProfile 1:N Comment)

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

postId.description: Reference to the Post this comment belongs to. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who authored the comment. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Comment)

content.description: The textual content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a scheduled event for a team, created and managed by admins. (Relationship: Team 1:N Event, UserProfile 1:N Event)

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this event belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Event)

startTime.description: The start time of the event (e.g., '18:00').

endTime.description: The optional end time of the event (e.g., '20:00').

location.description: The location where the event will take place.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

createdBy.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created the event. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Event)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

definition.description: Manages family units linking guardians to players.
